title: erigeron subtrinervis var. conspicuus
intro: Erigeron subtrinervis var. conspicuus, commonly known as the western daisy or conspicuous fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron subtrinervis var. conspicuus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
